items.kk: Мен түйіндемеме соңғы жұмыс тәжірибемді қостым.
items.en: I added my latest work experience to my résumé.
The interview starts at ten o'clock.

items.kk: Жұмыс беруші менің біліктілігіме қызығушылық танытты.
items.en: The employer showed interest in my qualifications.

items.kk: Мен өз күшті және әлсіз жақтарымды атап өттім.
items.en: I mentioned my strengths and weaknesses.

items.kk: Ұсынылған жалақы менің күткеніме сай келді.
items.en: The offered salary matched my expectations.
It is important to stay calm during the interview.
The company appreciated my experience.
I was told about the probationary period.
The recommendation letter strengthened my application.
The second round of interviews is next week.

items.kk: Біз жаңа пәтер жалдауды жоспарлап отырмыз.
items.en: We are planning to rent a new apartment.
The rent is paid monthly.
The property owner signed the contract.

items.kk: Бұл пәтердің коммуналдық төлемдері қосылған ба?
items.en: Are the utility bills included in this apartment?
We paid a security deposit.

items.kk: Пәтер жарық және ыңғайлы бөлмелерден тұрады.
items.en: The apartment consists of bright and comfortable rooms.

items.kk: Жылжымайтын мүлік агенті бізге бірнеше нұсқа ұсынды.
items.en: The real estate agent offered us several options.
The house was put up for sale.
I am going to the bank to get a mortgage.
The lease term lasts for one year.
The police arrived quickly at the crime scene.
The suspect was questioned.
There were witnesses at the place where the theft occurred.
The court issued a verdict.
The lawyer defended his client's rights.

items.kk: Полиция қызметкері жол ережесін бұзушыны тоқтатты.
items.en: The police officer stopped a traffic violator.
Crime statistics have decreased in recent years.
The accused was found not guilty.
The investigation lasted several months.
Citizens must report to the police.
